hooks.command: if command -v ox >/dev/null 2>&1; then OX_ARGS=''; [ -n "$PANOPTICON_AGENT_ID" ] && OX_ARGS='--auto-record'; [ -n "$OX_PROJECT_ROOT" ] && OX_ARGS="$OX_ARGS --project $OX_PROJECT_ROOT"; [ -n "$PAN_ISSUE_ID" ] && OX_ARGS="$OX_ARGS --issue $PAN_ISSUE_ID"; [ -n "$PAN_PARENT_SESSION" ] && OX_ARGS="$OX_ARGS --parent-session $PAN_PARENT_SESSION"; RESULT=$(AGENT_ENV=claude-code ox agent prime $OX_ARGS 2>&1) || true; echo "$RESULT"; AID=$(echo "$RESULT" | sed -n 's/.*"agent_id"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"\([^"]*\)".*/\1/p' | head -1); [ -n "$AID" ] && echo "$AID" > "/tmp/sageox-agent-id-${PANOPTICON_AGENT_ID:-default}"; else echo 'SageOx not installed (optional): https://github.com/sageox/ox'; fi

if command -v ox >/dev/null 2>&1; then OX_ARGS='--idempotent'; [ -n "$PANOPTICON_AGENT_ID" ] && OX_ARGS="$OX_ARGS --auto-record"; [ -n "$OX_PROJECT_ROOT" ] && OX_ARGS="$OX_ARGS --project $OX_PROJECT_ROOT"; [ -n "$PAN_ISSUE_ID" ] && OX_ARGS="$OX_ARGS --issue $PAN_ISSUE_ID"; [ -n "$PAN_PARENT_SESSION" ] && OX_ARGS="$OX_ARGS --parent-session $PAN_PARENT_SESSION"; RESULT=$(AGENT_ENV=claude-code ox agent prime $OX_ARGS 2>&1) || true; echo "$RESULT"; AID=$(echo "$RESULT" | sed -n 's/.*"agent_id"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"\([^"]*\)".*/\1/p' | head -1); [ -n "$AID" ] && echo "$AID" > "/tmp/sageox-agent-id-${PANOPTICON_AGENT_ID:-default}"; else echo 'SageOx not installed (optional): https://github.com/sageox/ox'; fi

if command -v ox >/dev/null 2>&1; then OX_ARGS='--idempotent'; [ -n "$PANOPTICON_AGENT_ID" ] && OX_ARGS="$OX_ARGS --auto-record"; [ -n "$OX_PROJECT_ROOT" ] && OX_ARGS="$OX_ARGS --project $OX_PROJECT_ROOT"; [ -n "$PAN_ISSUE_ID" ] && OX_ARGS="$OX_ARGS --issue $PAN_ISSUE_ID"; [ -n "$PAN_PARENT_SESSION" ] && OX_ARGS="$OX_ARGS --parent-session $PAN_PARENT_SESSION"; RESULT=$(AGENT_ENV=claude-code ox agent prime $OX_ARGS 2>&1) || true; echo "$RESULT"; AID=$(echo "$RESULT" | sed -n 's/.*"agent_id"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"\([^"]*\)".*/\1/p' | head -1); [ -n "$AID" ] && echo "$AID" > "/tmp/sageox-agent-id-${PANOPTICON_AGENT_ID:-default}"; else echo 'SageOx not installed (optional): https://github.com/sageox/ox'; fi

if command -v ox >/dev/null 2>&1; then OX_ARGS=''; [ -n "$PANOPTICON_AGENT_ID" ] && OX_ARGS='--auto-record'; [ -n "$OX_PROJECT_ROOT" ] && OX_ARGS="$OX_ARGS --project $OX_PROJECT_ROOT"; [ -n "$PAN_ISSUE_ID" ] && OX_ARGS="$OX_ARGS --issue $PAN_ISSUE_ID"; [ -n "$PAN_PARENT_SESSION" ] && OX_ARGS="$OX_ARGS --parent-session $PAN_PARENT_SESSION"; RESULT=$(AGENT_ENV=claude-code ox agent prime $OX_ARGS 2>&1) || true; echo "$RESULT"; AID=$(echo "$RESULT" | sed -n 's/.*"agent_id"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"\([^"]*\)".*/\1/p' | head -1); [ -n "$AID" ] && echo "$AID" > "/tmp/sageox-agent-id-${PANOPTICON_AGENT_ID:-default}"; else echo 'SageOx not installed (optional): https://github.com/sageox/ox'; fi

if command -v ox >/dev/null 2>&1; then OX_ARGS=''; [ -n "$PANOPTICON_AGENT_ID" ] && OX_ARGS='--auto-record'; [ -n "$OX_PROJECT_ROOT" ] && OX_ARGS="$OX_ARGS --project $OX_PROJECT_ROOT"; [ -n "$PAN_ISSUE_ID" ] && OX_ARGS="$OX_ARGS --issue $PAN_ISSUE_ID"; [ -n "$PAN_PARENT_SESSION" ] && OX_ARGS="$OX_ARGS --parent-session $PAN_PARENT_SESSION"; RESULT=$(AGENT_ENV=claude-code ox agent prime $OX_ARGS 2>&1) || true; echo "$RESULT"; AID=$(echo "$RESULT" | sed -n 's/.*"agent_id"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"\([^"]*\)".*/\1/p' | head -1); [ -n "$AID" ] && echo "$AID" > "/tmp/sageox-agent-id-${PANOPTICON_AGENT_ID:-default}"; else echo 'SageOx not installed (optional): https://github.com/sageox/ox'; fi

if command -v ox >/dev/null 2>&1; then AID_FILE="/tmp/sageox-agent-id-${PANOPTICON_AGENT_ID:-default}"; if [ -f "$AID_FILE" ]; then AID=$(cat "$AID_FILE"); ox agent "$AID" session stop 2>&1 || true; rm -f "$AID_FILE"; fi; fi
